steps.title: Identify the two clauses
steps.content: The sentence joins two independent clauses: the couple converted a vacant lot into an apiary, and in later years they acquired more lots and established more hives. Two independent clauses can be joined with a comma plus a coordinating conjunction.

steps.title: Apply the joining rule
steps.content: Choice A uses only a comma, creating a comma splice. Choice C uses the conjunction and without the needed comma. Choice D uses no punctuation or conjunction, creating a fused sentence. The comma plus and correctly joins the clauses. The answer is B.
